purpose: Decide the next safe in-plan work after H-A2.19 proxy-first robustness and L.7 macro-event proxy baseline, without treating either result as acceptance-grade evidence.

h_a2.conclusion: ยังสรุปไม่ได้

h_l1.conclusion: ยังสรุปไม่ได้
h_l1.future_llm_incremental_information_targe: Future H-L1 real-news or LLM scores must explain residual adverse days beyond deterministic macro/VIX labels.

decision_rationale: H-A2.19 gives directionally consistent E1 proxy evidence across 5-minute proxy, 15-minute proxy, and existing implementable trade outcomes.
The H-A2 signal weakens after big-day trimming but remains positive, so the next question should diagnose residual adverse days rather than jump to paper trading or buy broad data.
L.7 proves that deterministic macro/VIX labels are already a meaningful baseline; future news or LLM work must add information beyond that baseline.
Real timestamp-clean news cases remain unavailable, so live LLM prompt research stays blocked.
Exact 2022-10 ORB replay still requires real 2022 SPY bars, but that external blocker should not stop local mechanism-level residual analysis.

selected_next_path.allowed_next_artifact: A separate H-A2 residual/adverse-day analysis preregistration using only local artifacts.
allowed_scope: inspect non-risk losing days and macro-only losing days from existing trade outcomes
compare adverse days against deterministic macro/VIX labels, proxy move size, day-of-week, trend/regime labels where already local
identify whether H-A2 needs a narrower falsifiable condition before exact replay or data purchase
keep H-L1 real-news/LLM execution blocked until timestamp-clean news cases exist
selected_next_path.allowed_claim: H-A2 is still active at E1 and worth local residual analysis before any further source execution.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim H-A2 edge is validated.
Do not claim exact 2022-10 ORB has been tested.
Do not claim L.7 is LLM or real-news evidence.
Do not run live LLM calls.
Do not run live GDELT retries while cooldown is active.
Do not buy paid data or introduce a new provider.
Do not approve paper trading, operational validation, or real-money trading.

rejected_paths.reason: No strategy hypothesis has E2 acceptance and H-A2/H-L1 evidence remains E1/E0 only.
H-L1 lacks real timestamp-clean news cases; L.7 is a deterministic proxy baseline only.
The current command plan reports cooldown and live_retry_allowed=false.
Current headroom is only 5.010294 USD and the immediate local question does not require new paid data.
Real 2022-10 SPY underlying bars remain unavailable in local cache and IBKR is externally blocked.

tier_blockers: Source evidence is E1 proxy evidence
No LLM call or news sentiment test
